case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. RAIFF FREIRE DE QUEIROZ MENDES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,252.14 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDES, RAIFF FREIRE DE QUEIROZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-17-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENDES, RAIFF FREIRE DE QUEIROZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDES, RAIFF FREIRE DE QUEIROZ $1,252.14 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,337.14, ON DELINQUENT LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
